title: Vera Bradley Latest Stock News Headlines
text: Vera Bradley stock news frequently covers earnings results, executive changes, and strategic initiatives. Recent headlines include company's return to profitability in Q4 2026, naming of Ian Bickley as permanent CEO, cancellation of annual outlet sale, and FY2027 guidance. The company faces competition in the women's handbag and accessories market from larger consumer brands. Investor interest centers on execution of Project Restoration turnaround plan and return to sustainable profitability.
